Hi Siri, I hope you are doing well!  I've raised a request with the team to dig into why the leads have been coming in lower than expected, we want to get to the bottom of it for you.

In the meantime, one thing that really makes a difference on your end is keeping the reviews coming in consistently. Ideally, two reviews a week works well, it signals to Google that your business is active and trustwort…

Your profile is actually performing really well right now. If we pause or cancel at this stage (the very 1st month), all the optimization work we've built up would have to start from scratch again, and I'd hate to see yo…

Yes Siri
Almost 2 weeks passed, things are not working properly

I wanted to explain how the messaging feature works so there's no confusion. The app sends messages using the phone number that's actively connected to your device, meaning whichever SIM card you have installed.

When you use your personal phone with your personal number, all messages will send from that personal number because that's what the device is registered to. The app doesn't create a separate virtual number, it uses your…

What is this? I want to stop using your app and refund me
I logged out and tried to call again, it’s still showing personal number
If you want messages to go out from your business line, you'd need to either use a device with that business number's SIM card, or switch your SIM cards.
